case_title: GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER, SPE, LLC, A LIMITED VS. ARTHUR LEVY ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATEWAY CENTER, SPE, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DOING BUSINESS AS THE GATEWAY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEVY, ARTHUR , AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 440 DAVIS COURT, APARTMENT 912 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94111, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 71177706)
